title: Umami Creamy Indulgent American Banana Stir-fry
description: This umami-rich and creamy banana stir-fry is infused with Appleton Rum for a touch of indulgence. It's nut-free-friendly, perfect for breakfast or dessert.

ingredients.name: Tadka Mix (Garam Masala, Curry Leaves, Dry Red Chilies)
ingredients.notes: For a tadka at the beginning

instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add Tadka Mix and cook for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Stir in Apple Cider Vinaigrette, Almond Milk, All-purpose Flour, Salt, and Apple Cider Vinegar. Simmer for 2 minutes until thickened.
Add paprika powder, cayenne pepper, and ground almonds if using. Stir well.
Remove from heat and add Appelson Rum. Stir to combine evenly.
Slice bananas into thin rounds and add them to the saucepan. Mix gently to ensure even coverage with the sauce.
Transfer to a serving dish, garnish with fresh mango slices or avocado for additional color and freshness.
